name: Ayrshare
description: Ayrshare — unified social media API for posting, analytics, and comments across Instagram, LinkedIn, X, TikTok, and Facebook.

seo.title: Ayrshare — Data Integration / ETL / Reverse ETL
seo.meta_description: Ayrshare: Ayrshare — unified social media API for posting, analytics, and comments across Instagram, LinkedIn, X, TikTok, and Facebook.

when_to_use: Publishing social posts across Instagram, LinkedIn, TikTok via API
Building social media management SaaS with unified posting
Scheduling content across platforms from a single workflow
Fetching analytics and comments from multiple social channels
White-label social media posting for marketing platforms

pros: One API instead of five platform SDKs
Handles posting, analytics, and comments uniformly
Free tier suitable for prototypes and MVPs
Good docs and fast onboarding for developers
cons: Platform feature parity limited by vendor APIs
Rate limits inherited from underlying networks
Account disconnects are a recurring support issue
Not a replacement for full SMM suites like Sprout
review.verdict: Pragmatic unified social API for builders; great MVP accelerator but not a full SMM replacement.
review.best_for: SaaS builders embedding multi-platform social posting in their app
review.not_for: Agencies needing deep platform-specific features and scheduling workflows
